purpose: Focused follow-up TODO for the remaining Autopilot runtime blockers. Updated to reflect the actual state after commit ff126152ed35c9aa31a6ba8c26b045ae3fce172d: several code fixes are implemented, but critical regression/E2E tests and some production-hardening remain missing.

review_scope.test_search_result: Search did not find the expected dedicated test files for execute proposal validation, orchestrator fallback, new-project LLM-required behavior, no-sgpt regression or Fibonacci E2E. Existing/modified tests may exist under different names, but they were not visible through the repository search performed for this review.

current_state_summary.overall: Substantially improved, but not finished. Runtime code fixes for the main blockers are partly implemented. The remaining risk is mostly missing tests/E2E proof, incomplete production worker delegation, and some contract hardening.
implemented_or_partially_implemented: ExecutableProposal.model_validate(...) was replaced in execute_task_step by validate_executable_proposal(...).
ProposeStrategyOrchestrator no longer slices strategy_order by max_strategy_attempts and iterates the full strategy chain.
ProposeContext now carries policy so strategies can read policy settings.
ProposePolicy now has LLM_STRATEGY_IDS, allow_shell_execution and an llm_required property derived from llm_mode=primary_with_guardrails.
new_software_project no longer sets max_strategy_attempts=2 and remains LLM-first.
Orchestrator enforces llm_required when all configured LLM strategies decline with llm_required_but_unavailable.
LLMResponseNormalizer now blocks shell execution by default and rejects simple unsafe file paths for file blocks.
WorkerStrategy no longer generates mock output and safely declines when real worker delegation is not implemented.
remaining_blockers: Dedicated tests/E2E are still not visible for most critical tasks, so done cannot be claimed safely.
validate_executable_proposal returns only command/tool_calls/reason, not a full ExecutableProposal; this is acceptable as a minimal fix but not the final strongest contract.
Persisted last_proposal roundtrip still needs explicit test evidence.
WorkerStrategy still has workers=[] and runtime_targets=[] and returns real_worker_delegation_not_implemented after selection; safe, but not production delegation.
LLM strategy hardening exists partially, but provider/model capability handling and command/tool policy validation still need tests and likely more code.
No visible Fibonacci new-project E2E proving propose -> execute -> artifacts -> verification.

target_runtime_flow: Planner creates at least one new_software_project/coding task.
TaskScopedExecutionService.propose_task_step resolves effective ProposePolicy and passes it into ProposeContext.
For task_kind=new_software_project the default policy is LLM-first and llm_required via primary_with_guardrails.
ProposeStrategyOrchestrator evaluates the full configured strategy chain and does not truncate by max_strategy_attempts.
ToolCallingLLMStrategy tries real tool calling where possible.
FlexibleLLMNormalizationStrategy tries plain model output and normalizes safely according to policy.
If all LLM strategies are unavailable and llm_required=true, result becomes needs_review with llm_required_but_unavailable and no deterministic silent fallback.
Only valid ExecutableProposal-style command/tool_calls are persisted as last_proposal.
execute_task_step loads last_proposal via validate_executable_proposal without dataclass/Pydantic mismatch.
Execution writes real files or performs real tool calls.
Artifact collection and verification decide task completion, not final model prose.

global_acceptance_criteria.criterion: No call to ExecutableProposal.model_validate remains unless ExecutableProposal is converted to a Pydantic BaseModel.
global_acceptance_criteria.evidence: execute_task_step now imports and calls validate_executable_proposal(...). Full repository-wide grep/test evidence still missing.

global_acceptance_criteria.criterion: The orchestrator never truncates the strategy chain via strategy_order[:max_strategy_attempts].
global_acceptance_criteria.evidence: worker/core/propose_orchestrator.py now iterates for strategy_id in strategy_order. Dedicated tests still missing.

global_acceptance_criteria.criterion: new_software_project default path attempts a real configured LLM provider before deterministic/template fallback.
global_acceptance_criteria.evidence: Policy is LLM-first and llm_required. E2E proof against real/mocked provider still missing.

global_acceptance_criteria.criterion: If LLM is required but unavailable, the outcome is explicit and auditable: llm_required_but_unavailable.
global_acceptance_criteria.evidence: Orchestrator now returns needs_review with llm_required_but_unavailable after all LLM strategies decline due to unavailability. Tests still missing.

global_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Flexible normalization is reachable after tool-calling and JSON-schema strategies fail or decline.
global_acceptance_criteria.evidence: Chain is no longer sliced and new_software_project includes flexible_llm_normalization. Tests still missing.

global_acceptance_criteria.criterion: WorkerStrategy either delegates to real workers or clearly returns declined without dummy generated output.
global_acceptance_criteria.evidence: Dummy output was removed; current behavior safely declines. Real delegation is still not implemented.

global_acceptance_criteria.criterion: E2E test proves ananta new-project Fibonacci can go propose -> execute -> artifacts -> verification without sgpt.
global_acceptance_criteria.evidence: No visible matching E2E test found.

global_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Regression tests prove prose/invalid JSON cannot be executed and cannot cause infinite retry loops.
global_acceptance_criteria.evidence: No visible dedicated regression tests found.

tasks.title: Fix ExecutableProposal validation contract in execute_task_step
actual_state: Implemented minimal dataclass-compatible validation helper validate_executable_proposal(raw) in worker/core/propose.py.
execute_task_step now calls validate_executable_proposal(proposal) instead of ExecutableProposal.model_validate(proposal).
Validation maps ValueError/TypeError into invalid_executable_proposal_format response.
remaining_work: Add or verify dedicated tests/test_execute_consumes_executable_proposal.py.
Add tests for command proposal, tool_calls proposal, missing proposal, invalid proposal and advisory/non-executable proposal.
Consider upgrading validate_executable_proposal to return a full ExecutableProposal or adding ExecutableProposal.from_dict(...) for stronger contract symmetry.
Run/verify full test suite.
acceptance_criteria: execute_task_step can execute a persisted last_proposal dict without AttributeError.
Invalid proposal without command/tool_calls returns denied invalid_executable_proposal_format.
AdvisoryProposalArtifact, PatchProposalArtifact and FileProposalArtifact are rejected by execute unless explicitly converted/applied by controlled code.
Tests cover command proposal, tool_calls proposal, missing proposal, invalid proposal and advisory proposal.
done_definition: No runtime path calls model_validate on a dataclass.
All proposal validation errors are mapped to deterministic API responses.
Regression test fails before fix and passes after fix.

tasks.title: Fix ProposeStrategyOrchestrator strategy-chain semantics
actual_state: Orchestrator now iterates over the full strategy_order instead of strategy_order[:max_strategy_attempts].
attempted_strategies metadata is collected.
needs_review is now terminal.
max_strategy_attempts remains in ProposePolicy as a future per-strategy retry budget comment, but is not actively used for retries.
remaining_work: Add tests proving all strategies are attempted when they decline.
Add test proving flexible_llm_normalization is reached after tool_calling_llm/json_schema_llm decline.
Either rename max_strategy_attempts to max_attempts_per_strategy or document/deprecate it more clearly in schema/docs.
Add tests for terminal behavior of executable, failed, policy_denied and needs_review.
acceptance_criteria: A policy with seven strategies attempts all seven when each returns declined and on_all_strategies_declined=needs_review.
new_software_project reaches flexible_llm_normalization when tool_calling_llm and json_schema_llm decline.
attempted_strategies contains the complete actual chain with status and reason per strategy.
selected_strategy is set only for executable or terminal selected result.
max_attempts_per_strategy, if present, controls retry count per strategy, not chain length.
done_definition: No strategy_order slicing remains in orchestrator.
Tests prove fallback chain is complete.
Policy naming no longer misleads future implementation.

tasks.title: Enforce LLM-required default for new_software_project
actual_state: ProposePolicy now exposes llm_required derived from llm_mode == primary_with_guardrails.
LLM_STRATEGY_IDS was added.
new_software_project keeps LLM-first order and no longer limits strategy attempts to 2.
Orchestrator counts unavailable LLM strategies and returns needs_review with llm_required_but_unavailable when all configured LLM strategies are unavailable.
remaining_work: Add tests/test_new_project_llm_required_policy.py.
Verify behavior when one LLM strategy declines for tools_not_supported but another succeeds.
Verify behavior when provider is reachable but model returns no executable output: this should not be confused with provider unavailable.
Add explicit admin offline/demo fallback policy if deterministic fallback should be allowed.
acceptance_criteria: new_software_project with configured Ollama reachable attempts Ollama/OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
new_software_project with no reachable LLM returns needs_review or failed with llm_required_but_unavailable.
new_software_project does not silently continue to deterministic_handler after all LLM strategies fail due to provider unavailability.
coding tasks may still use deterministic_handler first if policy says so, because coding is not necessarily identical to project bootstrap.
Tests cover reachable LLM, unavailable LLM, unsupported tools with JSON fallback, and explicit admin offline fallback.
done_definition: Default new-project behavior really asks an LLM.
The failure mode is explicit and auditable.
No fake deterministic success hides a missing model provider.

tasks.title: Harden ToolCallingLLMStrategy and JsonSchemaLLMStrategy provider behavior
actual_state: ToolCallingLLMStrategy has a richer system prompt with task kind, goal and task id.
JsonSchemaLLMStrategy now appends a strict JSON instruction suffix.
LLMUnavailableError paths now add reason_codes such as llm_required and llm_provider_unavailable.
JsonSchemaLLMStrategy validates that parsed JSON is an object and filters tool_calls to dicts with a name.
remaining_work: Add or verify tests/test_tool_calling_llm_strategy.py and tests/test_json_schema_llm_strategy.py.
Distinguish provider/model tools_not_supported from provider_unavailable more robustly.
Validate commands/tool_calls against execution/tool policy before returning ExecutableProposal.
Mock HTTP provider responses for timeout, 4xx, 5xx, invalid JSON, no tool_calls and valid tool_calls.
acceptance_criteria: ToolCallingLLMStrategy returns executable only for validated tool_calls.
ToolCallingLLMStrategy returns declined tools_not_supported when provider/model cannot do tools but provider is otherwise reachable.
JsonSchemaLLMStrategy returns executable for valid command or tool_calls JSON.
JsonSchemaLLMStrategy returns advisory for parse failure, not executable.
Provider 4xx/5xx/timeout/connection errors become LLMUnavailableError-derived results with reason codes.
Tests use mocked HTTP responses and do not require a real Ollama server.
done_definition: LLM strategy behavior is deterministic under mocked provider responses.
Fallback from tools to JSON schema is tested.
No unsafe raw model text becomes executable.

tasks.title: Make FlexibleLLMNormalizationStrategy policy-aware and reachable
actual_state: FlexibleLLMNormalizationStrategy reads context.policy.allow_shell_execution.
LLMResponseNormalizer.normalize(...) now accepts allow_shell_execution.
Shell blocks are advisory by default and executable only when allow_shell_execution=true.
Simple unsafe file paths are rejected for file blocks.
Flexible normalization is reachable because orchestrator no longer truncates the strategy chain.
remaining_work: Add/verify dedicated tests for JSON, shell allowed, shell denied, diff, file block, prose and malformed output.
Extend safe path checks beyond regex-only if needed: workspace-root resolution should be used before applying/writing files.
Make unified diff and file proposal application path explicit and controlled.
Pass full policy/allowed_tools/command-risk context into normalizer, not only allow_shell_execution.
acceptance_criteria: Fenced JSON with command/tool_calls normalizes to ExecutableProposal after validation.
Shell block becomes executable only with explicit allow_shell policy.
Unified diff becomes PatchProposalArtifact/advisory path, not direct execution.
Plain prose becomes advisory only.
Unsafe paths are rejected with reason code unsafe_path.
Tests cover JSON, shell, diff, file block, prose and malformed output.
done_definition: Flexible normalization is usable as safe LLM fallback.
No raw markdown/prose path can bypass execution policy.
All major LLM response shapes are regression-tested.

tasks.title: Replace WorkerStrategy dummy implementation with real delegation or safe decline
actual_state: Mock/dummy output was removed from WorkerStrategy.
WorkerStrategy now safely returns declined when no worker is selected or when real delegation is not implemented.
workers=[] and runtime_targets=[] are still hardcoded, so real worker delegation is not implemented yet.
remaining_work: Resolve real workers from worker/agent registry.
Resolve real runtime targets from runtime config.
Delegate propose to selected worker adapter.
Normalize worker output through LLMResponseNormalizer or worker-specific adapter.
Add tests for no worker, local worker, cloud-blocked worker and unsupported worker.
acceptance_criteria: WorkerStrategy with no workers returns declined no_worker_selected.
WorkerStrategy with mocked OpenCode worker can return PatchProposalArtifact or ExecutableProposal according to adapter output.
WorkerStrategy with Hermes in phase-1 proposal mode returns advisory/proposal but not mutation execute.
WorkerStrategy does not produce fake command output when no real worker exists.
ContextAccessPolicy is checked before sending context to remote/cloud worker.
done_definition: No TODO mock output remains in WorkerStrategy production path.
Worker fallback is real or safely declined.
Tests cover no worker, local worker, cloud-blocked worker and unsupported worker.

tasks.title: Persist and reload last_proposal consistently
actual_state: execute_task_step now reloads persisted proposal through validate_executable_proposal(...).
propose_task_step persists executable proposals via persist_task_proposal_result(...).
No visible dedicated persisted roundtrip test found.
remaining_work: Inspect and test persist_task_proposal_result(...) output shape end-to-end.
Ensure persisted last_proposal command/tool_calls shape matches validate_executable_proposal expectations.
Add tests/test_persisted_last_proposal_contract.py.
Consider storing canonical executable_proposal.v1 field to avoid ambiguity.
acceptance_criteria: A proposal returned by ToolCallingLLMStrategy can be persisted and later executed without manual transformation.
A proposal returned by JsonSchemaLLMStrategy can be persisted and later executed without manual transformation.
Non-executable results are not persisted as last_proposal for execute.
Tests cover persisted shape roundtrip.
done_definition: Propose-to-execute contract is one stable shape.
No hidden shape mismatch between persistence service and execute path remains.

tasks.title: Add new-project E2E test with mocked Ollama/OpenAI-compatible provider
actual_state: No visible E2E test found for ananta new-project Fibonacci through mocked Ollama/OpenAI-compatible provider.
remaining_work: Create mocked OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions provider fixture.
Configure default_provider=ollama or generic openai-compatible local provider in test config.
Make mocked provider return valid tool_calls or JSON schema response for Fibonacci project files.
Run propose step and assert selected_strategy is tool_calling_llm or json_schema_llm.
Run execute step and assert files are created.
Run artifact collection and verification.
Assert task completes from artifacts/verification, not final prose.
acceptance_criteria: Test fails if sgpt is called.
Test fails if deterministic_handler is selected before LLM for new_software_project.
Test fails if no ExecutableProposal is persisted.
Test fails if execute cannot reload last_proposal.
Test passes with mocked local LLM provider.
done_definition: new-project LLM-default path is proven by E2E test.
The test is deterministic and does not require internet or real paid provider.

tasks.title: Add regression tests for no sgpt, no raw prose execution and no infinite retry
actual_state: No visible dedicated no-sgpt/prose/no-infinite-retry regression tests found.
remaining_work: Monkeypatch sgpt/run_sgpt_command to raise and prove propose path still works or fails explicitly without calling it.
Mock LLM returning plain natural language and assert result is advisory/needs_review, not executable.
Mock LLM returning malformed JSON and assert parse failure advances or terminates according to policy without infinite loop.
Assert retry counters are only used for retryable execution/artifact/verification failures, not endless parse repairs.
acceptance_criteria: sgpt is not called during default propose path.
Plain prose cannot become command/tool_calls.
Malformed JSON cannot become executable.
No infinite retry loop occurs after parse failure.
Reason codes are visible in result metadata.
done_definition: Original class of failure cannot silently reappear.
Tests document the intended safe failure modes.

tasks.title: Update todo.fixup-autopilot.json after finalization slice
actual_state: This focused TODO has been updated to actual state.
The larger todo.fixup-autopilot.json has not yet been synchronized in this update.
remaining_work: Re-review actual code after tests are added.
Update task statuses in todo.fixup-autopilot.json from todo/partial to done only where tests exist.
Reference this focused TODO as a follow-up slice or merge its final status into the main TODO.
Keep reviewed evidence and summary at the bottom of both files.
acceptance_criteria: Status summary matches actual code and tests.
No task is marked done without implementation and test evidence.
The final summary clearly states whether new-project LLM default is production-ready.
done_definition: TODO files are consistent and no longer overstate progress.
Final review summary is present.

critical_path.why: Only E2E proves the intended new-project LLM-default flow works from propose to verification.
Original failure class must be pinned by regression tests.
Propose and execute must share one stable persisted proposal shape.
LLM strategy behavior must be deterministic and safe under provider errors and unsupported feature cases.

expected_final_state.new_project_default: LLM-required, local-first, Ollama/OpenAI-compatible capable, explicit needs_review/failure if all LLM strategies are unavailable.
expected_final_state.proposal_contract: One tested ExecutableProposal contract from propose through persistence into execute.
expected_final_state.strategy_chain: Full configured chain is evaluated; max attempts do not truncate strategy ids.
expected_final_state.worker_fallback: Real worker delegation or safe declined result, no mock production output.
expected_final_state.completion: Artifact-first completion with tests and verification, not model prose.
expected_final_state.safety: No raw prose/Markdown execution, no sgpt default, no infinite parse retry.

review_evidence.finding: validate_executable_proposal(raw) exists and rejects missing command/tool_calls.
execute_task_step now calls validate_executable_proposal(proposal) instead of ExecutableProposal.model_validate(proposal).
Orchestrator iterates the full strategy_order and enforces llm_required_but_unavailable when all LLM strategies are unavailable.
LLM_STRATEGY_IDS, allow_shell_execution and llm_required are present; new_software_project is primary_with_guardrails.
Shell blocks are advisory unless allow_shell_execution=true; simple unsafe paths are rejected for file blocks.
Mock output was removed. WorkerStrategy currently safely declines because real worker delegation is not implemented.

review_summary_bottom.current_assessment: The most dangerous runtime bugs from the previous review are partially fixed in code. It is still not safe to mark the slice done because critical E2E/regression tests and persisted last_proposal roundtrip proof are missing.
review_summary_bottom.is_new_project_llm_default_correct_now: Partially. Policy and orchestrator behavior now enforce LLM-required much better, but a mocked-provider E2E test is still required before calling it correct.
review_summary_bottom.most_important_next_fix: Add E2E and regression tests: new-project Fibonacci with mocked Ollama/OpenAI-compatible provider, persisted last_proposal roundtrip, no sgpt, no raw prose execution, no infinite retry.
